convenientcrafting.configuration.title: %s Configuration
convenientcrafting.configuration.enableI:
Shows the player inventory sort button and enables middle-click sorting in the player inventory.
Disable this to avoid conflicts with dedicated inventory sorting mods.
convenientcrafting.configuration.enableC: Shows sort buttons and enables middle-click sorting in supported storage containers such as chests, barrels, and shulker boxes.

Shows category bags in the creative tab and enables their crafting recipes.
Existing bag items stay registered for save compatibility.
convenientcrafting.configuration.enableB:
Automatically inserts picked-up matching items into category bags in the player inventory.
When disabled, picked-up items use the normal vanilla inventory pickup flow.
convenientcrafting.configuration.useBagC:
Counts items stored inside category bags as available materials for Convenient Crafting.
When disabled, only visible inventory and container stacks are used.
convenientcrafting.configuration.enableA:
Allows Alt inventory sorting to compact mineral materials using repeated-material crafting recipes.
When disabled, Alt sorting behaves like normal inventory sorting.
convenientcrafting.configuration.enabled:
Controls the vanilla workstation recipe types that Convenient Crafting supports by default.
Default enabled ids: minecraft:crafting, minecraft:smithing, minecraft:brewing, minecraft:stonecutting.
Remove an id from this list to disable that workstation type.
convenientcrafting.configuration.additio:
Extra recipe type ids for modpack authors.
Only enable recipe types that are safe to craft directly from ingredients and a fixed result.
Extra recipe types also need a matching unlock rule before players can unlock them.
Examples: create:mechanical_crafting, malum:spirit_infusion.
convenientcrafting.configuration.recipeT:
Configures which items permanently unlock each recipe type for players.
Format: recipe_type=item_id,item_id.
Built-in minecraft:crafting, minecraft:smithing, minecraft:brewing, and minecraft:stonecutting use default unlock rules.
Examples: malum:spirit_infusion=malum:spirit_altar, create:mechanical_crafting=create:mechanical_crafter.
tooltip.convenientcrafting.sort_inventor:
Sort Inventory
Middle-click in the inventory to sort
tooltip.convenientcrafting.sort_containe:
Sort Container
Middle-click in this container to sort
gui.convenientcrafting.nested_missing.me: Nested crafting is missing these raw materials:
